title: 6501KW2002A Washer Rotor Position Sensor Assembly, Replacement Parts Compatible with LG/Kenmore Washing Machine Models
features: Specifications: Numbered 6501KW2002A, this washer rotor position sensor assembly is replaceable with parts AP4440680, 1268238, AH3529186, EA3529186, and PS3529186
Model Compatibility: It is compatible with LG/Kenmore washing machine models, including WM0532HW, WM1832CW, WM2016CW, and many others, ensuring versatility for various repair needs
Durable Plastic Material: Constructed from plastic, the sensor assembly offers excellent chemical resistance, making it resilient against corrosion and damage for long-term reliability

Precise Rotation Monitoring: The sensor accurately tracks the rotor's direction and speed, relaying this vital data to the electronic control board to ensure precise control and efficient washing machine operation

Effective Fault Resolution: If your washer fails to tumble, agitate, start, spins slowly, or displays "EO" or "LE" (locked rotor) errors, consider replacing the rotor position sensor to resolve these issues efficiently
description: Specification: Name: Washer Rotor Position Sensor Assembly Number: 6501KW2002A Material: Plastic Size: As Shown Fitment: Compatible with LG Kenmore Washing Machines Package Included: 1 * Washer Rotor Position Sensor Assembly
